items.title: Senior Year (12th standard) Indian students Rickrolled en masse by QR code in finals exam.
items.dek: This is arguably the largest and most critical board exam in the school system. The QR authentication code appeared in the Math question paper. submitted by /u/
items.body: This is arguably the largest and most critical board exam in the school system. The QR authentication code appeared in the Math question paper. submitted by /u/AisleSeatJunkie [link] [comments]

items.title: Madagascar military leader dissolves government in surprise move
items.dek: Col Randrianirina, who seized power last year, did not give a reason for dissolving his government.
items.body: Col Randrianirina, who seized power last year, did not give a reason for dissolving his government.
items.author: IriLine Desk
